events.name: Phoenix Suns at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 28 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder matched the best 25-game start to an NBA season by dominating the Phoenix Suns 138-89 in an NBA Cup quarterfinal on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 28 as Thunder tie NBA record for best start with 138-89 blowout of Suns

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Los Angeles Lakers

highlights.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights) 2025/12/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Stephon Castle scored 21 of his 30 points in the second half, and De'Aaron Fox added 20 points in the San Antonio Spurs' 132-119 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Wednesday night in an NBA Cup quarterfinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephon Castle scores 30 to lead Spurs into NBA Cup semifinals with 132-119 win over Lakers
